```{=html}
<div class="publication-card{{#if featured}} featured{{/if}}{{#if status}} {{status}}{{/if}}">
  {{#if featured}}
  <div class="publication-badge">Recent Publication</div>
  {{/if}}
  {{#if status}}
  <div class="publication-badge {{status}}">{{status}}</div>
  {{/if}}
  <div class="publication-content">
    <h3>{{title}}</h3>
    <p><strong>{{authors}}</strong></p>
    {{#if journal}}
    <p><em>{{journal}}</em>{{#if volume}} <strong>{{volume}}</strong>{{/if}}{{#if issue}}({{issue}}){{/if}}{{#if pages}}, {{pages}}{{/if}} ({{year}})</p>
    {{/if}}
    {{#if url}}
    <p><a href="{{url}}" target="_blank">DOI: {{doi}}</a></p>
    {{/if}}
    {{#if preprint_url}}
    <p><a href="{{preprint_url}}" target="_blank">Preprint DOI: {{preprint_doi}}</a></p>
    {{/if}}
    {{#if tags}}
    <div class="publication-tags">
      <ul>
        {{#each tags}}
        <li>{{this}}</li>
        {{/each}}
      </ul>
    </div>
    {{/if}}
  </div>
</div>
```
